docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AARON GRUBER. PLAINTIFF AIMEN MOTEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MASHABA RASHID IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: AARON GRUBER; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOTEN, AIMEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RASHID, MASHABA $1,714.29 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,814.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,383.46 FILED BY MOTEN, AIMEN AS TO DEFENDANT RASHID, MASHABA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-19-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RASHID, MASHABA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY MOTEN, AIMEN RASHID, MASHABA
